title: Retraction or change of award prohibited.
doc_html:
Art. 3131.  Retraction or change of award prohibited.

The arbitrators having once given their award, can not retract it nor change any thing in it.
doc_text:
Art. 3131.  Retraction or change of award prohibited.
The arbitrators having once given their award, can not retract it nor change any thing in it.
